column1: -- Row-level lock: mencegah concurrent update dari tab/browser berbeda
PERFORM 1 FROM credit_balances WHERE user_id = p_user_id FOR UPDATE
IF v_available < p_cost THEN RETURN FALSE
UPDATE credit_balances SET daily_free_used = daily_free_used + p_cost WHERE user_id = p_user_id
IF v_available < p_cost THEN RETURN FALSE
UPDATE credit_balances SET monthly_credits_used = monthly_credits_used + p_cost WHERE user_id = p_user_id
IF v_available < p_cost THEN RETURN FALSE
UPDATE credit_balances SET bonus_credits_used = bonus_credits_used + p_cost WHERE user_id = p_user_id
-- Abaikan jika gagal, jangan batalkan pendaftaran akun!
RAISE WARNING 'Gagal membuat saldo awal untuk user %: %', NEW.id, SQLERRM
SET free_credits_today = 5, free_credits_used_today = 0, last_free_reset = CURRENT_DATE, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = p_user_id AND last_free_reset < CURRENT_DATE
INSERT INTO public.credit_transactions (user_id, type, amount, description)
SELECT * INTO rec FROM public.user_credits WHERE user_id = p_user_id
IF NOT FOUND THEN RETURN false
SELECT * INTO rec FROM public.user_credits WHERE user_id = p_user_id
IF p_cost > total_available THEN RETURN false
SET free_credits_used_today = free_credits_used_today + free_used, used_credits = used_credits + paid_used, updated_at = NOW()
INSERT INTO public.credit_transactions (user_id, type, amount, description, action_type, node_id)
VALUES (p_user_id, 'usage', -p_cost, COALESCE(p_description, 'Used for ' || p_action_type), p_action_type, p_node_id)
